name: shortcuts-playground
description: Build, validate, sign, and archive macOS/iOS Shortcuts directly from Claude Code. Ships a full Shortcuts knowledge base, target-gated macOS 27 Apple-derived grounding data, a Craig Loop validator, a build agent, and a PostToolUse hook that auto-validates every .xml/.shortcut file as it is written.

output_dir.title: Shortcuts Playground output directory
output_dir.description: Directory where unsigned XML archives and signed .shortcut files are written. Example: /Users/you/Documents/Shortcuts Playground. Leave blank to fall back to ~/Documents/Shortcuts Playground.

signing_mode.title: Default shortcuts sign mode
signing_mode.description: Default mode passed to `shortcuts sign`. Use `anyone` to distribute publicly or `people-who-know-me` to restrict to your contacts. Leave blank for `anyone`.

target_macos.title: Target macOS for validation
target_macos.description: Target macOS major version for action availability. Leave blank or use `auto` to detect the host. Use `27` only when building Golden Gate-only shortcuts, or `latest` to include every packaged OS snapshot.

target_platform.title: Target platform for validation
target_platform.description: Target platform for action availability. Use `macos` for Mac shortcuts, `ios` for iPhone/iPad shortcuts, or `all` only when intentionally validating every packaged platform.
